rationale: Both candidates correctly validate the two core fixes (DiffusionOutput access/return and the already_submitted removal) and independently arrive at the same reasoning as the sole ground-truth inline comment. X reaches a well-calibrated APPROVE that matches the actual outcome (two LGTM approvals), with non-blocking suggestions appropriately scoped. Y is thorough and well-grounded but inflates three separate 'major' no-test-coverage findings (essentially the same complaint restated across files) into a REQUEST CHANGES verdict that misrepresents what real reviewers flagged, hurting precision despite good actionability.
